Drop-in UI Enumerations

The following enumerations are used with Xbox Drop-in UI:

UIX_LOGON_TYPE Logon type to perform. Used in UIX_LOGON_PARAMS.
UIX_NOTIFICATION_PURPOSE Purpose for which ILiveEngine::GetNotifications is being called.
UIX_PROPERTY_TYPE ILiveEngine properties.
UIX_VOICE_STATUS_TYPE Communicator and voice status returned by ITitlePlayersListItem::GetVoiceStatus.
